channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
item.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

item.title: Waymo Asks the DC Public to Pressure Their City Officials
item.description: Stuck in regulatory limbo, the self-driving-vehicle developer is encouraging residents of Washington, DC, to message public officials to help get its ...

item.title: Hacker linked to Epstein removed from Black Hat cyber conference website
item.description: Emails published by the Justice Department revealed cybersecurity veteran Vincenzo Iozzo emailed, and arranged to meet, Jeffrey Epstein multiple times...

item.title: OpenAI’s President Gave Millions to Trump. He Says It’s for Humanity
item.description: In an interview with WIRED, Greg Brockman says his political donations support OpenAI's mission—even if some employees at the company disagree.

item.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
item.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

item.title: Musk needed a new vision for SpaceX and xAI. He landed on Moonbase Alpha.
item.description: "I really want to see a mass driver on the moon that is shooting AI satellites into deep space."

item.title: A Wave of Unexplained Bot Traffic Is Sweeping the Web
item.description: From small publishers to US federal agencies, websites are reporting unusual spikes in automated traffic linked to IP addresses in Lanzhou, China.

item.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
item.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: ICE’s Secret Expansion Plans, Palantir Workers’ Ethical Concerns, and AI Assistants
item.description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, our hosts dive into WIRED’s scoop about a secret Trump administration campaign extending right into your backyard.

item.title: Our Favorite TV Is Still Almost Half Off
item.description: Best Buy continues to sell the TCL QM6K for a staggering discount.
